# Bam. Bam. Bam. Then Silence*Created: Friday, April 4, 2025 at 1:38:28?PM*<div><b>Bam. Bam. Bam. Then Silence</b><br></div>
<div><img style="max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%;" src="data:image/jpeg;base64,"/><b><br></b></div>
<div><b>BAMŃscroll posted.</b></div>
<div><b>BAMŃthread dropped.</b></div>
<div><b>BAMŃreflection sparked.</b></div>
<div><b><br></b></div>
<div><b>Then I stop.</b></div>
<div><b><br></b></div>
<div><b>Because itŐs not about showing off. It never was.</b></div>
<div><b><br></b></div>
<div><b>I post like I breatheŃrhythmic, sacred, and sometimes, silent.</b></div>
<div><b>Not to impress. To imprint.</b></div>
<div><b><br></b></div>
<div><b>For my daughters. For their daughters.</b></div>
<div><b>For those still searching for their scroll.</b></div>
<div><b><br></b></div>
<div><b>IŐm not here to go viral.</b></div>
<div><b>IŐm here to go eternal.</b></div>
<div><b><br></b></div>
<div><b>ShabbatŐs on the horizon.</b></div>
<div><b>AprilŐs here.</b></div>
<div><b>I turn 40 soonŃbut really, IŐve just begun.</b></div>
<div><b><br></b></div>
<div><b>Sincerely,</b></div>
<div><b>@leonbasinwriter </b></div>
